description_long: This hotel features a symmetrical, modern design with a flat roof and several prominent dome-shaped structures on top, giving it a unique architectural character. The facade is composed of large glass windows framed by reddish-brown columns, allowing for ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The building is surrounded by lush landscaping, including palm trees and manicured hedges, which create a welcoming and resort-like atmosphere. Outdoor seating areas with round red tables and chairs are visible on both sides, suggesting spaces for guests to relax or dine al fresco. Two smaller, dark-roofed structures are positioned at the corners of the property, possibly serving as auxiliary buildings or entrances. The main entrance is centrally located, marked by a wide staircase and a grand arched window above the doorway.
description: A modern hotel with dome-topped roofs, large glass windows, and lush landscaping, featuring outdoor seating and a grand central entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a wide staircase, central arched window, and symmetrical landscaping with palm trees and red tables.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dome roofs, glass windows, and a visible pool or covered area adjacent to the main building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional outdoor seating, and the symmetry of the dome structures and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more palm trees, the side entrance, and the arrangement of outdoor spaces and auxiliary buildings.
